positive: A whimsical and detailed illustration of a cosmic garden filled with bioluminescent flora and fauna. Central to the scene is a stylized, floating crescent moon cradling small, luminous potted plants and miniature, friendly nebula creatures. The style should be modern flat illustration mixed with art deco symmetry, featuring sharp, clean silhouettes and high-contrast colors (deep indigo, electric turquoise, magenta, and gold accents). The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and highly central, suitable for a t-shirt print. Dramatic rim lighting from the glowing elements creates depth, while the overall feel is bright, clean, and magical. Vector graphic quality, hyper-detailed linework, vibrant color palette.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, grainy, photo, photorealistic, 3d render
